===== FILE: ./templates/accounts/change_password.html =====
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block title %}Change Password | {{ user.username }} | MfalmeBits{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- Page Header -->
<section class="page-header py-5 position-relative overflow-hidden">
    <div class="animated-bg"></div>
    <div class="container position-relative z-index-2">
        <div class="row justify-content-center text-center">
            <div class="col-lg-8">
                <span class="badge glass-badge mb-4">
                    <i class="fas fa-key me-2"></i>Security
                </span>
                <h1 class="display-4 fw-bold text-white mb-4">Change <span class="text-gradient-highlight">Password</span></h1>
                <p class="lead text-light-emphasis">Update your password to keep your account secure</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- Change Password Form -->
<section class="change-password-content py-5">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="row justify-content-center">
            <div class="col-lg-6">
                <!-- Security Tips Card -->
                <div class="security-tip glass-card-2 p-4 mb-4">
                    <div class="d-flex align-items-start">
                        <div class="tip-icon me-3">
                            <i class="fas fa-shield-alt fa-2x text-primary-accent"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <h5 class="text-white fw-bold mb-2">Password Requirements</h5>
                            <ul class="text-light-emphasis small mb-0">
                                <li>Minimum 8 characters long</li>
                                <li>At least one uppercase letter</li>
                                <li>At least one number</li>
                                <li>At least one special character</li>
                                <li>Don't use common or easily guessed passwords</li>
                            </ul>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Password Change Form -->
                <div class="glass-card-2 p-5">
                    <form method="post" class="password-form" id="passwordForm">
                        {% csrf_token %}
                        
                        <!-- Current Password -->
                        <div class="mb-4">
                            <label for="{{ form.current_password.id_for_label }}" class="form-label text-white fw-bold">
                                <i class="fas fa-lock me-2 text-primary-accent"></i>Current Password
                            </label>
                            <div class="password-input-wrapper">
                                <input type="password" 
                                       name="{{ form.current_password.name }}"
                                       id="{{ form.current_password.id_for_label }}"
                                       class="form-control glass-input {% if form.current_password.errors %}is-invalid{% endif %}"
                                       placeholder="Enter current password"
                                       required>
                                <button type="button" class="password-toggle" onclick="togglePassword('current')">
                                    <i class="fas fa-eye" id="toggleCurrentIcon"></i>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            {% if form.current_password.errors %}
                                <div class="invalid-feedback d-block">
                                    {% for error in form.current_password.errors %}
                                        {{ error }}
                                    {% endfor %}
                                </div>
                            {% endif %}
                        </div>

                        <!-- New Password -->
                        <div class="mb-4">
                            <label for="{{ form.new_password.id_for_label }}" class="form-label text-white fw-bold">
                                <i class="fas fa-key me-2 text-primary-accent"></i>New Password
                            </label>
                            <div class="password-input-wrapper">
                                <input type="password" 
                                       name="{{ form.new_password.name }}"
                                       id="{{ form.new_password.id_for_label }}"
                                       class="form-control glass-input {% if form.new_password.errors %}is-invalid{% endif %}"
                                       placeholder="Enter new password"
                                       required>
                                <button type="button" class="password-toggle" onclick="togglePassword('new')">
                                    <i class="fas fa-eye" id="toggleNewIcon"></i>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            {% if form.new_password.errors %}
                                <div class="invalid-feedback d-block">
                                    {% for error in form.new_password.errors %}
                                        {{ error }}
                                    {% endfor %}
                                </div>
                            {% endif %}
                            
                            <!-- Password Strength Meter -->
                            <div class="password-strength mt-3">
                                <div class="strength-meter">
                                    <div class="strength-bar" id="strengthBar"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="strength-text text-light-emphasis small mt-2" id="strengthText">
                                    Enter a password
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <!-- Password Requirements Checklist -->
                            <div class="password-checklist mt-3" id="passwordChecklist">
                                <div class="requirement" id="req-length">
                                    <i class="far fa-circle me-2"></i> At least 8 characters
                                </div>
                                <div class="requirement" id="req-uppercase">
                                    <i class="far fa-circle me-2"></i> At least one uppercase letter
                                </div>
                                <div class="requirement" id="req-lowercase">
                                    <i class="far fa-circle me-2"></i> At least one lowercase letter
                                </div>

                                    <i class="far fa-circle me-2"></i> At least one number
                                </div>
                                <div class="requirement" id="req-special">
                                    <i class="far fa-circle me-2"></i> At least one special character
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Confirm Password -->
                        <div class="mb-5">
                            <label for="{{ form.confirm_password.id_for_label }}" class="form-label text-white fw-bold">
                                <i class="fas fa-check-circle me-2 text-primary-accent"></i>Confirm New Password
                            </label>
                            <div class="password-input-wrapper">
                                <input type="password" 
                                       name="{{ form.confirm_password.name }}"

                                       class="form-control glass-input {% if form.confirm_password.errors %}is-invalid{% endif %}"
                                       placeholder="Confirm new password"
                                       required>
                                <button type="button" class="password-toggle" onclick="togglePassword('confirm')">
                                    <i class="fas fa-eye" id="toggleConfirmIcon"></i>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            {% if form.confirm_password.errors %}
                                <div class="invalid-feedback d-block">
                                    {% for error in form.confirm_password.errors %}
                                        {{ error }}
                                    {% endfor %}
                                </div>
                            {% endif %}
                            
                            <!-- Password Match Indicator -->
                            <div class="password-match mt-2" id="passwordMatch">
                                <i class="fas fa-times-circle text-danger me-1"></i>
                                <span class="small">Passwords do not match</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Form Actions -->
                        <div class="d-flex gap-3">
                            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary-gradient flex-grow-1" id="submitBtn">
                                <i class="fas fa-save me-2"></i>Update Password
                            </button>
                            <a href="{% url 'accounts:settings' %}" class="btn btn-outline-gradient">
                                <i class="fas fa-times me-2"></i>Cancel
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </div>

                <!-- Additional Security Links -->
                <div class="security-links text-center mt-4">
                    <p class="text-light-emphasis small">
                        <i class="fas fa-question-circle me-1 text-primary-accent"></i>
                        Forgot your password? 
                        <a href="{% url 'accounts:password_reset_request' %}" class="text-primary-accent text-decoration-none">Reset it here</a>
                    </p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<script>
    // Password visibility toggle
    function togglePassword(field) {
        const input = document.getElementById(`id_${field}_password`);
        const icon = document.getElementById(`toggle${field.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + field.slice(1)}Icon`);
        
        if (input.type === 'password') {
            input.type = 'text';
            icon.classList.remove('fa-eye');
            icon.classList.add('fa-eye-slash');
        } else {
            input.type = 'password';
            icon.classList.remove('fa-eye-slash');
            icon.classList.add('fa-eye');
        }
    }

    // Password strength checker
    const passwordInput = document.getElementById('id_new_password');
    const strengthBar = document.getElementById('strengthBar');
    const strengthText = document.getElementById('strengthText');
    
    // Requirement elements
    const reqLength = document.getElementById('req-length');
    const reqUppercase = document.getElementById('req-uppercase');
    const reqLowercase = document.getElementById('req-lowercase');
    const reqNumber = document.getElementById('req-number');
    const reqSpecial = document.getElementById('req-special');

    // Password match checker
    const newPassword = document.getElementById('id_new_password');
    const confirmPassword = document.getElementById('id_confirm_password');
    const passwordMatch = document.getElementById('passwordMatch');
    const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');

    function checkPasswordStrength(password) {
        let strength = 0;
        let requirements = {
            length: password.length >= 8,
            uppercase: /[A-Z]/.test(password),
            lowercase: /[a-z]/.test(password),
            number: /[0-9]/.test(password),
            special: /[!@#$%^&*(),.?":{}|<>]/.test(password)
        };

        // Update requirement indicators
        reqLength.className = requirements.length ? 'requirement valid' : 'requirement invalid';
        reqUppercase.className = requirements.uppercase ? 'requirement valid' : 'requirement invalid';
        reqLowercase.className = requirements.lowercase ? 'requirement valid' : 'requirement invalid';
        reqNumber.className = requirements.number ? 'requirement valid' : 'requirement invalid';
        reqSpecial.className = requirements.special ? 'requirement valid' : 'requirement invalid';

        // Update requirement icons
        reqLength.querySelector('i').className = requirements.length ? 'fas fa-check-circle me-2' : 'far fa-circle me-2';
        reqUppercase.querySelector('i').className = requirements.uppercase ? 'fas fa-check-circle me-2' : 'far fa-circle me-2';
        reqLowercase.querySelector('i').className = requirements.lowercase ? 'fas fa-check-circle me-2' : 'far fa-circle me-2';
        reqNumber.querySelector('i').className = requirements.number ? 'fas fa-check-circle me-2' : 'far fa-circle me-2';
        reqSpecial.querySelector('i').className = requirements.special ? 'fas fa-check-circle me-2' : 'far fa-circle me-2';

        // Calculate strength
        strength = Object.values(requirements).filter(Boolean).length;

        // Update strength bar
        strengthBar.className = 'strength-bar';
        if (password.length === 0) {
            strengthBar.style.width = '0';
            strengthText.textContent = 'Enter a password';
        } else if (strength <= 2) {
            strengthBar.classList.add('strength-weak');
            strengthText.textContent = 'Weak password';
        } else if (strength === 3) {
            strengthBar.classList.add('strength-fair');
            strengthText.textContent = 'Fair password';
        } else if (strength === 4) {
            strengthBar.classList.add('strength-good');
            strengthText.textContent = 'Good password';
        } else if (strength === 5) {
            strengthBar.classList.add('strength-strong');
            strengthText.textContent = 'Strong password';
        }
    }

    function checkPasswordMatch() {
        const newPass = newPassword.value;
        const confirmPass = confirmPassword.value;
        
        if (confirmPass.length > 0) {
            if (newPass === confirmPass) {
                passwordMatch.style.display = 'block';
                passwordMatch.className = 'password-match match';
                passwordMatch.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check-circle me-1"></i><span class="small">Passwords match</span>';
            } else {
                passwordMatch.style.display = 'block';
                passwordMatch.className = 'password-match';
                passwordMatch.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-times-circle me-1"></i><span class="small">Passwords do not match</span>';
            }
        } else {
            passwordMatch.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    // Event listeners
    passwordInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
        checkPasswordStrength(this.value);
        checkPasswordMatch();
    });

    confirmPassword.addEventListener('input', checkPasswordMatch);

    // Form submission validation
    document.getElementById('passwordForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
        const newPass = newPassword.value;
        const confirmPass = confirmPassword.value;
        
        if (newPass !== confirmPass) {
            e.preventDefault();
            alert('Passwords do not match!');
        }
    });

    // Initialize password strength on page load
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        if (passwordInput.value) {
            checkPasswordStrength(passwordInput.value);
        }
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    /* в”Җв”Җ Floating particles в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
    const pc = document.getElementById('dashParticles');
    if (pc) {
        for (let i = 0; i < 35; i++) {
            const p = document.createElement('div');
            const s = Math.random() * 4 + 1.5;
            const colors = [
                'rgba(193,58,16,', 'rgba(212,146,42,', 'rgba(16,185,129,',
                'rgba(59,130,246,', 'rgba(255,255,255,'
            ];
            const c = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
            Object.assign(p.style, {
                position: 'absolute',
                borderRadius: '50%',
                pointerEvents: 'none',
                width:  s + 'px',
                height: s + 'px',
                left:   Math.random() * 100 + '%',
                bottom: '-20px',
                background: c + (Math.random() * .18 + .04) + ')',
                boxShadow: `0 0 ${s*2}px ${c}.25)`,
                animation: `floatUp ${Math.random()*18+10}s linear infinite`,
                animationDelay: `-${Math.random()*12}s`,
                willChange: 'transform',
            });
            pc.appendChild(p);
        }
    }
});
</script>
<style>
@keyframes floatUp {
    from { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg) scale(1); opacity: 0; }
    10%  { opacity: 1; }
    90%  { opacity: .6; }
    to   { transform: translateY(-100vh) rotate(540deg) scale(.5); opacity: 0; }
}
</style>
{% endblock %}

<style>
    :root {
        --primary-accent: #ff6b4a;
        --secondary-accent: #ff8a6f;
        --success-accent: #10b981;
        --warning-accent: #f59e0b;
        --info-accent: #3b82f6;
        --deep-charcoal: #0a0c0f;
        --medium-charcoal: #1a1e24;
        --light-charcoal: #2a2f36;
    }

    /* Page Header */
    .page-header {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--deep-charcoal) 0%, var(--medium-charcoal) 100%);
        min-height: 300px;
    }

    .animated-bg {
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        right: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        background: linear-gradient(-45deg, var(--primary-accent), var(--secondary-accent), #8B4513, #c97c5d);
        background-size: 400% 400%;
        animation: gradientShift 15s ease infinite;
        opacity: 0.1;
    }

    @keyframes gradientShift {
        0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
        50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
        100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    }

    .glass-badge {
        background: rgba(255, 107, 74, 0.2);
        backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 107, 74, 0.3);
        color: white;
        padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem;
        border-radius: 50px;
        display: inline-block;

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        const searchInput = document.getElementById('downloadSearch');
        const typeFilter = document.getElementById('typeFilter');
        const applyBtn = document.getElementById('applyFilters');

        function applyFilters() {
            const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
            
            if (searchInput.value) {
                params.set('q', searchInput.value);
            } else {
                params.delete('q');
            }
            
            if (typeFilter.value) {
                params.set('type', typeFilter.value);
            } else {
                params.delete('type');
            }
            
            window.location.href = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
        }

        applyBtn.addEventListener('click', applyFilters);
        
        searchInput.addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                applyFilters();
            }
        });
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

</script>

        <!-- Saved Items Grid -->

                                </a>
                            </h5>

                            {% endif %}

                                    {% for tag in item.tags.split %}
                                        <span class="tag">{{ tag }}</span>
                                    {% endfor %}
                                </div>
                            {% endif %}

                                </span>

                                        <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                {% endfor %}
            </div>

            <!-- Pagination -->
            {% if is_paginated %}
            <nav class="pagination-wrapper mt-5">
                <ul class="pagination-modern">
                    {% if page_obj.has_previous %}
                    <li class="page-item">
                        <a class="page-link" href="?page=1{% if search_query %}&q={{ search_query }}{% endif %}{% if current_type != 'all' %}&type={{ current_type }}{% endif %}">
                            <i class="fas fa-angle-double-left"></i>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    <li class="page-item">
                        <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.previous_page_number }}{% if search_query %}&q={{ search_query }}{% endif %}{% if current_type != 'all' %}&type={{ current_type }}{% endif %}">
                            <i class="fas fa-angle-left"></i>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    {% endif %}

                    {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}
                        {% if page_obj.number == num %}
                        <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link">{{ num }}</span></li>
                        {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}
                        <li class="page-item">
                            <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ num }}{% if search_query %}&q={{ search_query }}{% endif %}{% if current_type != 'all' %}&type={{ current_type }}{% endif %}">{{ num }}</a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}
                    {% endfor %}

                    {% if page_obj.has_next %}
                    <li class="page-item">
                        <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}{% if search_query %}&q={{ search_query }}{% endif %}{% if current_type != 'all' %}&type={{ current_type }}{% endif %}">
                            <i class="fas fa-angle-right"></i>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    <li class="page-item">
                        <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.paginator.num_pages }}{% if search_query %}&q={{ search_query }}{% endif %}{% if current_type != 'all' %}&type={{ current_type }}{% endif %}">
                            <i class="fas fa-angle-double-right"></i>
                        </a>
                    </li>
                    {% endif %}
                </ul>
            </nav>
            {% endif %}

        {% else %}
            <!-- Empty State -->
            <div class="empty-state glass-card-2 text-center py-5">
                <div class="empty-icon mb-4">
                    <i class="fas fa-bookmark fa-5x text-light-emphasis"></i>
                </div>
                <h3 class="h3 text-white mb-3">No Saved Items Yet</h3>
                <p class="text-light-emphasis mb-4">Start saving your favorite content from across the platform.</p>
                <div class="action-buttons">
                    <a href="{% url 'archive:index' %}" class="btn btn-primary-gradient btn-lg me-3">
                        <i class="fas fa-archive me-2"></i>Browse Archive
                    </a>
                    <a href="{% url 'library:index' %}" class="btn btn-outline-gradient btn-lg">
                        <i class="fas fa-book me-2"></i>Explore Library

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        const searchInput = document.getElementById('searchInput');
        const typeFilter = document.getElementById('typeFilter');
        const sortFilter = document.getElementById('sortFilter');
        const applyBtn = document.getElementById('applyFilters');

        function applyFilters() {
            const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
            
            if (searchInput.value) {
                params.set('q', searchInput.value);
            } else {
                params.delete('q');
            }
            
            if (typeFilter.value && typeFilter.value !== 'all') {
                params.set('type', typeFilter.value);
            } else {
                params.delete('type');
            }
            
            if (sortFilter.value) {
                params.set('sort', sortFilter.value);
            } else {
                params.delete('sort');
            }
            
            window.location.href = `${window.location.pathname}?${params.toString()}`;
        }

        applyBtn.addEventListener('click', applyFilters);
        
        searchInput.addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {
            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                applyFilters();
            }
        });
    });

    function removeSavedItem(itemId) {
        if (confirm('Are you sure you want to remove this item from your saved items?')) {
            fetch('{% url "accounts:toggle_saved" %}', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': '{{ csrf_token }}'
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    item_id: itemId,
                    action: 'remove'
                })
            })
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(data => {
                if (data.success) {
                    location.reload();
                }
            });
        }
    }

    function editNotes(itemId) {
        // Implement edit notes functionality
        const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('editNotesModal'));
        modal.show();
    }
</script>
{% endblock %}

                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </form>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Appearance Tab -->
                    <div class="tab-pane fade" id="appearance" role="tabpanel">
                        <div class="glass-card-2 p-5">
                            <h3 class="h4 text-white fw-bold mb-4">Appearance Settings</h3>
                            
                            <form method="post" action="{% url 'accounts:settings' %}" class="settings-form">
                                {% csrf_token %}
                                
                                <div class="appearance-settings">
                                    <div class="setting-item mb-4">
                                        <label class="form-label text-white">Theme Preference</label>
                                        <div class="theme-options d-flex gap-3 mt-2">
                                            <div class="theme-option {% if user.preferences.theme == 'light' %}active{% endif %}" onclick="selectTheme('light')">
                                                <div class="theme-preview light-theme"></div>
                                                <span class="text-white mt-2 d-block">Light</span>
                                            </div>
                                            <div class="theme-option {% if user.preferences.theme == 'dark' %}active{% endif %}" onclick="selectTheme('dark')">
                                                <div class="theme-preview dark-theme"></div>
                                                <span class="text-white mt-2 d-block">Dark</span>
                                            </div>
                                            <div class="theme-option {% if user.preferences.theme == 'system' %}active{% endif %}" onclick="selectTheme('system')">
                                                <div class="theme-preview system-theme"></div>
                                                <span class="text-white mt-2 d-block">System</span>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <input type="hidden" name="theme" id="selectedTheme" value="{{ user.preferences.theme|default:'dark' }}">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                
                                <div class="mt-5">
                                    <button type="submit" name="appearance_submit" class="btn btn-primary-gradient px-5">

                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </form>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<script>
    function selectTheme(theme) {
        // Update hidden input
        document.getElementById('selectedTheme').value = theme;
        
        // Update active state
        document.querySelectorAll('.theme-option').forEach(option => {
            option.classList.remove('active');
        });
        event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');
    }

    // Tab persistence
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Check for saved tab in localStorage
        const savedTab = localStorage.getItem('settingsTab');
        if (savedTab) {
            const tab = document.querySelector(`[data-bs-target="${savedTab}"]`);
            if (tab) {
                const tabInstance = new bootstrap.Tab(tab);
                tabInstance.show();
            }
        }

        // Save active tab to localStorage
        const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('[data-bs-toggle="pill"]');
        tabs.forEach(tab => {
            tab.addEventListener('shown.bs.tab', function(event) {
                localStorage.setItem('settingsTab', event.target.dataset.bsTarget);
            });
        });
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

                    {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}

                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.theme %}&theme={{ request.GET.theme }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Next">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.paginator.num_pages }}{% if request.GET.q %}&q={{ request.GET.q }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.theme %}&theme={{ request.GET.theme }}{% endif %}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Last">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;&raquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                {% endif %}
            </ul>
        </nav>
        {% endif %}
    </div>

            {% for theme_item in themes %}
            <div class="col-md-4 col-lg-3">
                <a href="{% url 'archive:by_theme' theme_item.slug %}" class="text-decoration-none">
                    <div class="card text-center h-100 shadow-sm hover-card">
                        <div class="card-body">
                            <i class="fas {{ theme_item.icon }} fa-3x mb-3" style="color: {{ theme_item.color }};"></i>
                            <h5 class="card-title">{{ theme_item.name }}</h5>
                            <p class="text-muted small">{{ theme_item.entry_count }} entries</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </a>
            </div>
            {% endfor %}
        </div>
    </div>
</section>
{% endif %}

<!-- Popular Tags -->
{% if popular_tags %}
<section class="tags-section py-5">
    <div class="container">
        <h2 class="h3 mb-4 text-center">Popular Tags</h2>
        <div class="text-center">
            {% for tag in popular_tags %}
            <a href="{% url 'archive:by_tag' tag.slug %}" class="badge bg-light text-dark text-decoration-none p-2 m-1 border" style="font-size: {% widthratio tag.entry_count 5 0.8 %}rem;">
                #{{ tag.name }} ({{ tag.entry_count }})
            </a>
            {% endfor %}
        </div>
    </div>
</section>
{% endif %}

<style>
    .hover-card {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    }
    .hover-card:hover {
        transform: translateY(-5px);
        box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12) !important;

===== FILE: ./templates/archive/tag.html =====
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block title %}Entries tagged with '{{ tag.name }}' - MfalmeBits Archive{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- Page Header -->
<section class="page-header bg-dark text-white py-5">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-12 text-center">
                <h1 class="display-4 fw-bold">#{{ tag.name }}</h1>
                <nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
                    <ol class="breadcrumb justify-content-center">
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="/" class="text-white-50">Home</a></li>
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{% url 'archive:index' %}" class="text-white-50">Archive</a></li>
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item active text-white" aria-current="page">Tag: {{ tag.name }}</li>
                    </ol>
                </nav>
                <p class="lead">{{ page_obj.paginator.count }} entries tagged with "{{ tag.name }}"</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- Entries Listing -->
<section class="archive-listing py-5">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="row g-4">
            {% for entry in entries %}
            <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
                <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm hover-card">
                    {% if entry.featured_image %}
                    <img src="{{ entry.featured_image.url }}" class="card-img-top" alt="{{ entry.image_alt|default:entry.title }}" style="height: 200px; object-fit: cover;">
                    {% endif %}
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <span class="badge bg-secondary mb-2">{{ entry.theme.name }}</span>
                        <h5 class="card-title">{{ entry.title }}</h5>
                        <p class="card-text text-muted small">
                            <i class="fas fa-user me-1"></i> {{ entry.author }} |
                            <i class="fas fa-calendar me-1"></i> {{ entry.published_date|date:"M d, Y" }}
                        </p>
                        <p class="card-text">{{ entry.excerpt|truncatewords:25 }}</p>
                        <a href="{% url 'archive:detail' entry.theme.slug entry.slug %}" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">Read More</a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            {% empty %}
            <div class="col-12 text-center py-5">
                <i class="fas fa-tag fa-4x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                <h3>No Entries Found</h3>
                <p class="text-muted">No entries with this tag yet.</p>
            </div>
            {% endfor %}
        </div>

        <!-- Pagination -->
        {% if is_paginated %}
        <nav class="mt-5">
            <ul class="pagination justify-content-center">
                {% if page_obj.has_previous %}
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page=1" aria-label="First">&laquo;&laquo;</a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.previous_page_number }}" aria-label="Previous">&laquo;</a>
                </li>
                {% endif %}

                {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}
                    {% if page_obj.number == num %}
                    <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link">{{ num }}</span></li>
                    {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}
                    <li class="page-item"><a class="page-link" href="?page={{ num }}">{{ num }}</a></li>
                    {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}

                {% if page_obj.has_next %}
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}" aria-label="Next">&raquo;</a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.paginator.num_pages }}" aria-label="Last">&raquo;&raquo;</a>
                </li>
                {% endif %}
            </ul>
        </nav>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</section>

    .hover-card {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    }
    .hover-card:hover {
        transform: translateY(-5px);
        box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12) !important;
    }

    }

{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block title %}{{ theme.name }} - MfalmeBits Archive{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- Page Header -->

        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-12 text-center">

                <nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
                    <ol class="breadcrumb justify-content-center">
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="/" class="text-white-50">Home</a></li>
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{% url 'archive:index' %}" class="text-white-50">Archive</a></li>
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item active text-white" aria-current="page">{{ theme.name }}</li>
                    </ol>
                </nav>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- Theme Description -->
{% if theme.description %}

    <div class="container">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-lg-8 mx-auto">
                <div class="card border-0 bg-transparent">
                    <div class="card-body text-center">
                        <i class="fas {{ theme.icon }} fa-3x mb-3" style="color: {{ theme.color }};"></i>
                        <p class="lead">{{ theme.description }}</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>
{% endif %}

<!-- Entries Listing -->
<section class="archive-listing py-5">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="row mb-4">
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <h2 class="h3">Entries in this Theme</h2>
                <p class="text-muted">{{ page_obj.paginator.count }} entries found</p>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
                <form method="get" class="row g-2 justify-content-md-end">
                    <div class="col-auto">
                        <select name="sort" class="form-select" onchange="this.form.submit()">
                            <option value="-published_date" {% if request.GET.sort == '-published_date' %}selected{% endif %}>Newest First</option>
                            <option value="published_date" {% if request.GET.sort == 'published_date' %}selected{% endif %}>Oldest First</option>
                            <option value="title" {% if request.GET.sort == 'title' %}selected{% endif %}>Title A-Z</option>
                            <option value="-views_count" {% if request.GET.sort == '-views_count' %}selected{% endif %}>Most Viewed</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="row g-4">
            {% for entry in entries %}
            <div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
                <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm hover-card">
                    {% if entry.featured_image %}
                    <img src="{{ entry.featured_image.url }}" class="card-img-top" alt="{{ entry.image_alt|default:entry.title }}" style="height: 200px; object-fit: cover;">
                    {% endif %}
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <h5 class="card-title">{{ entry.title }}</h5>
                        <p class="card-text text-muted small">
                            <i class="fas fa-user me-1"></i> {{ entry.author }} |
                            <i class="fas fa-calendar me-1"></i> {{ entry.published_date|date:"M d, Y" }} |
                            <i class="fas fa-eye me-1"></i> {{ entry.views_count }}
                        </p>
                        <p class="card-text">{{ entry.excerpt|truncatewords:30 }}</p>
                        <div class="mb-2">
                            {% for tag in entry.tags.all|slice:":3" %}
                            <a href="{% url 'archive:by_tag' tag.slug %}" class="badge bg-secondary text-decoration-none me-1">#{{ tag.name }}</a>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </div>
                        <a href="{% url 'archive:detail' theme.slug entry.slug %}" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm">Read More</a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            {% empty %}
            <div class="col-12 text-center py-5">
                <i class="fas fa-folder-open fa-4x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                <h3>No Entries Yet</h3>
                <p class="text-muted">There are no entries in this theme at the moment.</p>
            </div>
            {% endfor %}
        </div>

        <!-- Pagination -->
        {% if is_paginated %}
        <nav class="mt-5">
            <ul class="pagination justify-content-center">
                {% if page_obj.has_previous %}
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page=1{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="First">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&laquo;&laquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.previous_page_number }}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Previous">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&laquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                {% endif %}

                {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}
                    {% if page_obj.number == num %}
                    <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link">{{ num }}</span></li>
                    {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}
                    <li class="page-item"><a class="page-link" href="?page={{ num }}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}">{{ num }}</a></li>
                    {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}

                {% if page_obj.has_next %}
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Next">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                <li class="page-item">
                    <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.paginator.num_pages }}{% if request.GET.sort %}&sort={{ request.GET.sort }}{% endif %}" aria-label="Last">
                        <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;&raquo;</span>
                    </a>
                </li>
                {% endif %}
            </ul>
        </nav>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</section>

    <!-- в”Җв”Җ SEO в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ -->

    <!-- в”Җв”Җ Open Graph в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ -->

    <style>
    /* в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
       DESIGN SYSTEM вҖ” MfalmeBits  В·  Dark Glassmorphism Edition
       African editorial В· deep obsidian + terracotta + ochre
       UPDATED: Improved typography with better readability
    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
        /* в”Җв”Җ Brand palette в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
        --ink:          #06060a;
        --deep:         #0d0d12;
        --charcoal:     #111118;
        --surface:      #17171f;
        --surface-2:    #1e1e28;
        --surface-3:    #252530;
        --border:       rgba(255,255,255,.06);
        --border-glow:  rgba(193,58,16,.30);

        --terra:        #c13a10;
        --terra-light:  #e0541e;
        --terra-dark:   #9a2e0b;
        --terra-dim:    rgba(193,58,16,.12);
        --ochre:        #d4922a;
        --ochre-light:  #e8aa46;
        --ochre-dim:    rgba(212,146,42,.10);
        --cream:        #f7f2ea;
        --sage:         #7a9e8a;
        --cobalt:       #1e4da1;
        --cobalt-light: #2e65c9;
        --forest:       #1a5c3a;
        --forest-light: #278050;
        --plum:         #6b1e5c;
        --plum-light:   #982d85;

        /* в”Җв”Җ Glass tokens (dark-first) в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
        --glass-1:      rgba(255,255,255,.030);

        /* в”Җв”Җ Typography в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
        --ff-display: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
        --ff-head:    'Syne', system-ui, sans-serif;
        --ff-body:    'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif;

        /* в”Җв”Җ Text Colors - Improved contrast в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
        --txt:          #ffffff;

        --r-sm:   10px;
        --r-md:   16px;
        --r-lg:   24px;
        --r-xl:   34px;
        --r-pill: 999px;

        /* в”Җв”Җ Shadows в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
        --sh-sm:    0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.25);
        --sh-md:    0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.38);
        --sh-lg:    0 14px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.48);

        /* в”Җв”Җ Motion в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
        --ease:  cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);

        --nav-h:  72px;
        --max-w:  1300px;

        /* в”Җв”Җ Active theme tokens в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
        --bg:      var(--ink);

       BASE TYPOGRAPHY IMPROVEMENTS
    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */
    html {
        scroll-behavior: smooth;
        -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
        text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
    }

    body {
        font-family: var(--ff-body);
        font-size: 1.05rem;
        line-height: 1.7;  /* Improved line height for readability */
        color: var(--txt);
        background: var(--bg);
        overflow-x: hidden;
        transition: background var(--slow), color var(--slow);
        min-height: 100vh;
    }

    /* в”Җв”Җ Improved Heading Styles - Less weight, more breathing room в”Җв”Җ */
    h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
        font-family: var(--ff-head);
        line-height: 1.2;  /* Vertical breathing room */
        color: var(--txt);
        font-weight: 700;  /* Reduced from 800/900 for better readability */
        letter-spacing: -0.02em;  /* Slight tightening, but not too much */
    }
    
    /* Specific heading weights for hierarchy */
    h1 { 
        font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5rem); 
        font-weight: 700;
        letter-spacing: -0.02em;
        line-height: 1.15;
    }
    h2 { 
        font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4.5vw, 3.8rem); 
        font-weight: 700;
        letter-spacing: -0.015em;
    }
    h3 { 
        font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3.2vw, 2.5rem); 
        font-weight: 600;  /* Lighter weight for subheadings */
        letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    }
    h4 { 
        font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 2rem); 
        font-weight: 600;
    }
    h5 { 
        font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.5rem);   
        font-weight: 600;
    }
    h6 { 
        font-size: 1rem; 
        font-weight: 600;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.05em;  /* Professional uppercase style */
    }

    /* в”Җв”Җ Improved Body Text Readability в”Җв”Җ */
    p {
        color: var(--txt-70);
        margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        font-size: 1.05rem;
        line-height: 1.65;  /* Optimal readability */
        font-weight: 400;   /* Standard weight */
        letter-spacing: 0.01em;  /* Slight letter spacing for openness */
        max-width: 75ch;    /* Optimal line length for readability */
    }
    
    /* Limit text width on larger screens */
    .text-container, 
    .content-wrapper,
    .blog-content,

        max-width: 75ch;
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    /* в”Җв”Җ Display font override в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */

       GLOBAL ATMOSPHERIC BACKGROUND
    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */
    body::before {
        content: '';
        position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: -3;
        background:
            radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 20% 10%,  rgba(193,58,16,.05) 0%, transparent 55%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 70% at 80% 80%,  rgba(212,146,42,.04) 0%, transparent 50%),
            radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 100% at 50% 50%, var(--deep) 0%, var(--ink) 100%);
    }

            radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 20% 10%,  rgba(193,58,16,.03) 0%, transparent 55%),

       LAYOUT
    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */

    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */

    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */

    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */

    }

    /* в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
       SCROLL PROGRESS
    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */
    #scrollProgress {
        position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; height: 2px; width: 0;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--terra-light), var(--ochre), var(--terra-light));
        z-index: 9998; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0;
        box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(193,58,16,.35);
        transition: width .06s linear;
    }

    /* в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
       TOAST MESSAGES
    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */

        position: fixed;
        top: calc(var(--nav-h) + 1.2rem);
        right: 1.5rem;
        z-index: 1060;
        max-width: 380px;
        pointer-events: none;
    }
    .glass-alert {
        pointer-events: all;
        background: rgba(20,20,28,.88);
        backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
        border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
        border-radius: var(--r-lg);
        box-shadow: var(--sh-xl);
        padding: 1.1rem 1.3rem;

        animation: toastIn .4s var(--ease) both;
    }

    .glass-alert .toast-icon {
        width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
        display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: .85rem; margin-top: 1px;
    }

        background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 0;
        color: var(--txt-50); font-size: .9rem; flex-shrink: 0;

    }

       REVEAL ANIMATIONS
    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */

       FOOTER
    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */

    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */

    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */

    в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ */

в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ -->

<!-- в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
     NAVBAR
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ -->

<!-- в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
     MAIN CONTENT
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ -->
<main class="main-content">

    {% if messages %}
    <div class="messages-container" role="alert" aria-live="polite">
        {% for message in messages %}
        <div class="glass-alert alert-{{ message.tags }} alert-dismissible">
            <div class="toast-icon">
                <i class="fas {% if message.tags == 'success' %}fa-check{% elif message.tags == 'error' or message.tags == 'danger' %}fa-times{% elif message.tags == 'warning' %}fa-exclamation{% else %}fa-info{% endif %}"></i>
            </div>
            <div class="toast-body flex-1">
                <div class="toast-title">{% if message.tags == 'success' %}Success{% elif message.tags == 'error' or message.tags == 'danger' %}Error{% elif message.tags == 'warning' %}Warning{% else %}Info{% endif %}</div>
                <div class="toast-msg">{{ message }}</div>
            </div>
            <button class="toast-close" onclick="this.closest('.glass-alert').remove()" aria-label="Dismiss">
                <i class="fas fa-times"></i>
            </button>
        </div>
        {% endfor %}
    </div>
    {% endif %}

    {% block content %}{% endblock %}
</main>

<!-- в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
     FOOTER
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ -->

<!-- в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
     FLOATING CONTROLS
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ -->
<button id="themeToggle" aria-label="Toggle dark mode" title="Toggle theme">
    <i class="fas fa-sun"></i>
</button>
<button id="backToTop" aria-label="Back to top" title="Back to top">
    <i class="fas fa-arrow-up"></i>
</button>

<!-- в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
     SCRIPTS
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>

{% compress js %}
<script src="{% static 'js/main.js' %}"></script>
{% endcompress %}

{% block extra_js %}{% endblock %}

<script>
(function () {
    'use strict';

    /* в”Җв”Җ Theme в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
    const root  = document.documentElement;
    const tBtn  = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
    const tIcon = tBtn ? tBtn.querySelector('i') : null;

    /* Default to dark */
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('mbTheme') || 'dark';

    function applyTheme(t) {
        root.setAttribute('data-theme', t);
        localStorage.setItem('mbTheme', t);
        if (tIcon) tIcon.className = t === 'dark' ? 'fas fa-sun' : 'fas fa-moon';
    }
    applyTheme(saved);
    tBtn && tBtn.addEventListener('click', () =>
        applyTheme(root.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'));

    /* в”Җв”Җ Loading screen в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            const ls = document.getElementById('loadingScreen');
            if (ls) ls.classList.add('hidden');
        }, 500);
    });

    /* в”Җв”Җ Navbar scroll state в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
    const nav = document.querySelector('.navbar');
    function handleNavScroll() {
        if (!nav) return;
        nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 50);
    }
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleNavScroll, { passive: true });
    handleNavScroll();

    /* в”Җв”Җ Scroll progress + back-to-top в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
    const bar = document.getElementById('scrollProgress');
    const btt = document.getElementById('backToTop');

    function onScroll() {
        const st = document.documentElement.scrollTop || document.body.scrollTop;
        const h  = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - document.documentElement.clientHeight;
        if (bar) bar.style.width = (st / h * 100) + '%';
        if (btt) btt.classList.toggle('visible', st > 400);
    }
    window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
    btt && btt.addEventListener('click', () => window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' }));

    /* в”Җв”Җ Scroll reveal в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
    const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        entries.forEach(e => {
            if (!e.isIntersecting) return;
            e.target.classList.add('on', 'animate-in');
            io.unobserve(e.target);
        });
    }, { threshold: .07, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .fade-in, .slide-in-left, .slide-in-right, .scale-in')
            .forEach((el, i) => {
                el.style.transitionDelay = (i % 7) * .07 + 's';
                io.observe(el);
            });

        /* Auto-dismiss toasts */
        document.querySelectorAll('.glass-alert').forEach(el => {
            setTimeout(() => {
                el.style.opacity = '0';
                el.style.transform = 'translateX(115%)';
                el.style.transition = 'opacity .45s ease, transform .45s ease';
                setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 460);
            }, 5500);
        });
    });

    /* в”Җв”Җ Custom cursor в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
    const dot  = document.getElementById('cursorDot');
    const ring = document.getElementById('cursorRing');
    let mx = -120, my = -120, rx = -120, ry = -120;

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY; });

    function animCursor() {
        if (dot)  { dot.style.left = mx + 'px'; dot.style.top = my + 'px'; }
        rx += (mx - rx) * .11;
        ry += (my - ry) * .11;
        if (ring) { ring.style.left = rx + 'px'; ring.style.top = ry + 'px'; }
        requestAnimationFrame(animCursor);
    }
    animCursor();

    /* в”Җв”Җ Magnetic buttons в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
    function initMagnetic() {
        document.querySelectorAll(
            '.btn-primary-mb, .btn-ghost-mb, .btn-ochre-mb, .btn-glass-mb'
        ).forEach(el => {
            el.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) {
                const r = this.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - r.left - r.width  / 2) * .2;
                const y = (e.clientY - r.top  - r.height / 2) * .2;
                this.style.transform = `translate(${x}px,${y}px) translateY(-3px)`;
            });
            el.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () {
                this.style.transform = '';
            });
        });
    }
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initMagnetic);

    /* в”Җв”Җ App card tilt parallax в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.app-card').forEach(card => {
            card.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) {
                const r = this.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = (e.clientX - r.left) / r.width  - .5;
                const y = (e.clientY - r.top)  / r.height - .5;
                this.style.transform =
                    `perspective(1000px) rotateX(${y * -5}deg) rotateY(${x * 5}deg) translateY(-10px) scale(1.014)`;
            });
            card.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () {
                this.style.transform = '';
            });
        });
    });

    /* в”Җв”Җ Counter animation в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ */
    const cIO = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        entries.forEach(e => {
            if (!e.isIntersecting) return;
            const el = e.target;
            const target = parseInt(el.dataset.target || el.textContent, 10);
            if (!isFinite(target)) return;
            let count = 0;
            const step = Math.ceil(target / 100);
            const t = setInterval(() => {
                count = Math.min(count + step, target);
                el.textContent = count.toLocaleString();
                if (count >= target) clearInterval(t);
            }, 14);
            cIO.unobserve(el);
        });
    }, { threshold: .5 });
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.counter').forEach(el => cIO.observe(el));
    });

})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
===== FILE: ./templates/blog/archive.html =====
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block title %}{{ seo_title }}{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- Archive Header -->
<section class="archive-header py-5 bg-primary text-white">
    <div class="container text-center">
        <h1 class="display-4 fw-bold mb-3">
            {% if archive_month %}
                Archive: {{ month_name }} {{ archive_year }}
            {% elif archive_year %}
                Archive: {{ archive_year }}
            {% else %}
                Blog Archive
            {% endif %}
        </h1>
        <p class="lead mb-0">{{ posts.paginator.count }} post{{ posts.paginator.count|pluralize }} found</p>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- Archive Content -->
<section class="archive-content py-5">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-lg-8 mx-auto">
                <nav aria-label="breadcrumb" class="mb-4">
                    <ol class="breadcrumb">
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{% url 'home' %}">Home</a></li>
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="{% url 'blog:index' %}">Blog</a></li>
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">
                            {% if archive_month %}
                                {{ month_name }} {{ archive_year }}
                            {% elif archive_year %}
                                {{ archive_year }}
                            {% else %}
                                Archive
                            {% endif %}
                        </li>
                    </ol>
                </nav>

                <!-- Archive Navigation -->
                <div class="archive-nav mb-5">
                    <div class="row">
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <select class="form-select" id="year-select" onchange="window.location.href=this.value">
                                <option value="">Select Year</option>
                                {% get_archive_years as years %}
                                {% for year in years %}
                                <option value="{% url 'blog:archive_year' year.year %}" {% if year.year == archive_year %}selected{% endif %}>
                                    {{ year.year }}
                                </option>
                                {% endfor %}
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        {% if archive_year %}
                        <div class="col-md-6">
                            <select class="form-select" id="month-select" onchange="window.location.href=this.value">
                                <option value="">Select Month</option>
                                {% get_month_names as months %}
                                {% for month_num, month_name in months.items %}
                                <option value="{% url 'blog:archive_month' archive_year month_num %}" 
                                        {% if month_num == archive_month|add:"0" %}selected{% endif %}>
                                    {{ month_name }}
                                </option>
                                {% endfor %}
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        {% endif %}
                    </div>
                </div>

                {% if posts %}
                <div class="posts-list">
                    {% for post in posts %}
                    <article class="post-item mb-4 pb-3 border-bottom">
                        <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start">
                            <div>
                                <h3 class="h5 mb-2">
                                    <a href="{{ post.get_absolute_url }}" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
                                        {{ post.title }}
                                    </a>
                                </h3>
                                <div class="post-meta small text-muted mb-2">
                                    <span><i class="far fa-calendar-alt me-1"></i> {{ post.published_date|date:"F j, Y" }}</span>
                                    <span class="ms-3"><i class="far fa-user me-1"></i> {{ post.author.get_full_name|default:post.author.username }}</span>
                                    <span class="ms-3"><i class="far fa-folder me-1"></i> {{ post.category.name }}</span>
                                </div>
                                <p class="text-muted small">{{ post.excerpt|truncatewords:20 }}</p>
                            </div>
                            {% if post.featured_image %}
                            <a href="{{ post.get_absolute_url }}" class="ms-3 flex-shrink-0">
                                <img src="{{ post.featured_image.url }}" 
                                     alt="{{ post.image_alt|default:post.title }}"
                                     style="width: 80px; height: 80px; object-fit: cover;"
                                     class="rounded-3">
                            </a>
                            {% endif %}
                        </div>
                    </article>
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>

                <!-- Pagination -->
                {% if is_paginated %}
                <nav aria-label="Page navigation" class="mt-4">
                    <ul class="pagination justify-content-center">
                        {% if page_obj.has_previous %}
                        <li class="page-item">
                            <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.previous_page_number }}" aria-label="Previous">
                                <span aria-hidden="true">&laquo;</span>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}

                        {% for num in page_obj.paginator.page_range %}
                            {% if page_obj.number == num %}
                            <li class="page-item active"><span class="page-link">{{ num }}</span></li>
                            {% elif num > page_obj.number|add:'-3' and num < page_obj.number|add:'3' %}
                            <li class="page-item"><a class="page-link" href="?page={{ num }}">{{ num }}</a></li>
                            {% endif %}
                        {% endfor %}

                        {% if page_obj.has_next %}
                        <li class="page-item">
                            <a class="page-link" href="?page={{ page_obj.next_page_number }}" aria-label="Next">
                                <span aria-hidden="true">&raquo;</span>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {% endif %}
                    </ul>
                </nav>
                {% endif %}

                {% else %}
                <div class="text-center py-5">
                    <i class="fas fa-archive fa-4x text-muted mb-3"></i>
                    <h3>No posts found</h3>
                    <p class="text-muted">There are no posts in this archive period.</p>
                    <a href="{% url 'blog:index' %}" class="btn btn-primary mt-3">
                        <i class="fas fa-arrow-left me-2"></i>Back to Blog
                    </a>
                </div>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>
{% endblock %}
===== FILE: ./templates/blog/author.html =====
{% extends 'base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block title %}{{ seo_title }}{% endblock %}
{% block description %}{{ seo_description }}{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- Author Header -->
<section class="author-header py-5 bg-primary text-white">
    <div class="container">

                     alt="{{ author.user.get_full_name|default:author.user.username }}"
                     class="rounded-circle border border-4 border-white shadow"
                     style="width: 150px; height: 150px; object-fit: cover;">
                {% else %}
                <div class="avatar-placeholder rounded-circle bg-white text-primary d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center mx-auto" 
                     style="width: 150px; height: 150px;">
                    <span class="display-4">{{ author.user.username|first|upper }}</span>
                </div>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
            <div class="col-lg-9">
                <h1 class="display-4 fw-bold mb-2">{{ author.user.get_full_name|default:author.user.username }}</h1>

                {% endif %}
                {% if author.bio %}
                <p class="mb-3">{{ author.bio|safe }}</p>
                {% endif %}
                <div class="social-links">
                    {% if author.twitter %}
                    <a href="{{ author.twitter }}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="text-white me-3">
                        <i class="fab fa-twitter fa-lg"></i>
                    </a>
                    {% endif %}
                    {% if author.linkedin %}

                    </a>
                    {% endif %}

                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
